nasb.text: ‘Cursed is he who accepts a bribe to strike down an innocent person.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

esv.text: “‘Cursed be anyone who takes a bribe to shed innocent blood.’ And all the people shall say, ‘Amen.’

cnv.text: “‘接受賄賂殺人，流無辜人的血的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

ccb.text: ‘凡因收受贿赂而杀害无辜的必受咒诅！’ 全体民众要回答说，‘阿们！’
